title: GRUT-RAI: Grand Responsive Universe Theory - Responsive AI Engine (Phase II)
description: Phase II release of GRUT-RAI, the auditable FastAPI physics engine for GRUT. Adds quantum bridge decoherence endpoint (EQ-QUANTUM-001, m^-2/3 slope law), Tier 0 local-tau collapse solver restoring physical infall, OP_QPRESS_001 finite-radius endpoint operator, and the full anti-artifact acceptance suite (8 tests). Companion software to the Phase II manuscript (DOI 10.5281/zenodo.18917257). Phase I concept DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18521060.
